_README: Hand-curated, SOURCE-CITED facts that GitHub does not expose (money raised, funding round, legal name, domicile). This is the ONLY place such data may enter the radar. Every entry MUST cite a real source in 'funding_source'. Never estimate, infer, or fabricate — an empty file is correct until a value is verified. Keys are 'owner/repo' (case-insensitive); keys beginning with '_' are ignored by the loader.
